fractions.title: Introduction to Fractions
fractions.description: Learn about fractions using pizzas, pies, and interactive visualizations

fractions.title: Introduction to Fractions
fractions.intro: Fractions represent parts of a whole. Let's explore how fractions work!
fractions.barExplorerDesc: Slide the bar to see how fractions change. Watch how the decimal equivalent updates!
fractions.pizzaGameDesc: Select the correct number of pizza slices to match the target fraction
fractions.slicesCorrect: That's correct! You selected the right amount
fractions.fractionMatchPairsDesc: Match each fraction with its decimal equivalent
fractions.hint1: Look at the numerator and denominator
fractions.hint2: Remember: a larger denominator means smaller pieces
